stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
After the pre-flight preparation, the flight plan log shown in the annex was completed, taking into account the meteorological conditions. Due to unforeseen reasons, a delay of 3 hours is expected. Following this delay, the updated conditions result in a new groundspeed of 193 kt between WPT B and WPT C. What is the new accumulated time between WPT A and WPT C?
